items.h: AEW's Jeff Jarrett Says Tony Khan Will Appear On TNA Episode Of Dark Side Of The Ring
items.p: "Dark Side of the Ring" premieres next month with a three-part episode on TNA Wrestling. Jeff Jarrett confirmed Tony Khan will be on the TNA episodes.

items.h: Orange Cassidy Explains What Mick Foley Brings To AEW
items.p: AEW's Orange Cassidy has discussed the impact WWE Hall of Famer Mick Foley has already made on the promotion following his debut at Double or Nothing.

items.h: Speedball Mike Bailey Struggles With AEW Betrayal
items.p: Mike Bailey has discussed his emotions following Kevin Knight's heel turn and their subsequent AEW match, claiming that Knight won only because of Don Callis.
